creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 241404
Patch for rubberband

Update (lib)rubberband to 3.2.1

Add "make test" target

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make test, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)

Compile tested with following ports in Poudriere (12.4 amd64)
audio/ardour
audio/denemo
audio/mixxx
audio/mixxx22 (fails to build, unrelated)
audio/pulseeffects (fails to build, unrelated)
audio/qtractor
audio/shuriken
audio/sonic-visualiser
audio/zrythm
